description: Git-state matrix: the basic project scanned with no .git (none) and a git-init-no-commit repo (init-no-head). Both must exit 0, produce SARIF, and keep the log free of the converter/contributor NPE strings (QD-4597, QD-3755).

expectations.reason: Scan must produce at least one result in both the no-.git and git-init-no-head states (id-agnostic floor; git state is the only variable).
